title: Everton beat Burnley to secure first home win of 2026
fullText: Everton put two past bottom-of-the-table Burnley to win 2-0 and secure their first home victory of 2026.MATCH REPORT: Everton 2-0 BurnleyAvailable to UK users only.
summary: Everton put two past bottom-of-the-table Burnley to win 2-0 and secure their first home victory of 2026.
